case_title: BRODIE JAMES S VS RODRIQUEZ VERONICA D

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RECEIVED FROM PLTFF. AND SENT TO JUDGE COLBERT.
EXHIBITS RECEIVED FROM JUDGE COLBERT AND SENT TO SUPERIOR COURT, CASE HAS BEEN APPEALED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRODIE JAMES S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ VERONICA D DEFT WAS ENTITLED TO CLEAR INTERSECTION & THEREFOR HAD RIGHT-OF-WAY BASED ON POINT OF OF IMPACT ON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRODIE JAMES S AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ VERONICA D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
CAR AND LOCATION OF VEHICLES AFTER IMPACT. NO RES JUDICATA.
REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF FOR REHEARING IN SUPERIOR COURT DENIED ON 4-15-94.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRODIE JAMES S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ VERONICA D $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
